# UC-13.6.6 · Grafana Annotation Creation Rate for Deployment Correlation

## Description

Annotation storms often coincide with flapping CI jobs or runaway automation posting duplicate deployment markers, which obscures incident timelines. Spikes in annotation rate per dashboard highlight misconfigured pipelines before charts become unreadable.

## Value

Keeps Grafana timelines trustworthy for blameless postmortems and customer communications.

## Implementation

Normalize `dashboard_uid` from audit payloads. If annotations arrive via custom HEC, set `sourcetype=grafana:audit` for consistency. Exclude synthetic monitors using a tag filter.

## SPL

```spl
index=observability sourcetype="grafana:audit"
| search annotation OR "tags=*deploy*"
| eval deploy_tag=if(match(lower(tags),"(?i)deploy|release|rollback"),1,0)
| bin _time span=1h
| stats count as anno_rate, sum(deploy_tag) as deploy_markers by _time, dashboard_uid, org_id
| eventstats median(anno_rate) as med_rate by dashboard_uid
| where anno_rate > med_rate * 4 AND anno_rate > 10
| sort -anno_rate
```

## Visualization

Timechart (annotations/hour), breakdown by `user` or `service`, table of dashboards with spikes.

## References

- [Grafana — Annotations](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/dashboards/build-dashboards/annotate-visualizations/)
